home.title: Today's Race Board
home.subtitle: Choose today's race challenge. You only get one daily entry.
home.completed_subtitle: You finished today's race! Come back tomorrow for a new challenge.
home.countdown_desc: Come back tomorrow for a new set of race challenges!

history.title: Race History
history.subtitle: Your past challenges and performance records.
history.empty: No race records found. Start a daily challenge to build your history!
history.subtitle_desc: View your past challenge outcomes, records, and training logs.

language.title: Choose Your Language
language.subtitle: You can change this later in settings.

slide_1.title: Welcome to RunQuest
slide_1.subtitle: Your daily offline-first running simulation game.
slide_1.content: Every day presents a brand new, procedurally generated running challenge. Step into the shoes of a runner preparing for the ultimate run.

slide_2.title: How to Play
slide_2.subtitle: Manage your assets, mindset, and physical thresholds.
slide_2.content: Choose the perfect shoes for the weather and road surfaces. Pack nutrition, pick your pacing strategy, and maintain focus to finish under target time.

slide_3.title: What to Expect
slide_3.subtitle: Deterministic physics, story events, and results sharing.
slide_3.content: Watch the race unfold live. Read the dynamic story narrative generated from your decisions. Download your beautiful Share Card to show off your rank!

slide_4.title: Your Runner Profile
slide_4.subtitle: Choose your runner name before you start.
slide_4.content: We've generated a runner name for you. Feel free to edit it below, or roll the dice to get a new one!

empty.today_desc: Take a rest day, hit the training screen to boost your runner stats, or apply for jobs.
empty.registered_desc: Browse the Upcoming Calendar tab to find events and sign up before registration closes!
empty.upcoming_desc: Check back later for new events.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your preferences and app configurations

sound.title: Sound Effects
sound.desc: Play sound indicators during race simulation

language.title: Language
language.desc: System and game interface translation language

theme.title: Color Theme
theme.desc: Choose how RunQuest looks on your device.

preferences.desc: Races matching these preferences will sort to the top of your Daily Race Board.

danger.desc: Permanently delete your profile, stats, run history, and reset your daily board entries. This cannot be undone.
danger.modal_desc: This will wipe all records of your running journey. All stats, completion histories, and preferences will be permanently destroyed.

currency.title: Display Currency
currency.desc: Choose how money amounts are displayed. This doesn't affect game balance.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.directory_desc: Build your reputation and win races to unlock top-tier corporate partnerships.

economy.already_worked_today: Already worked today. Rest or wait until tomorrow to work again.
economy.low_energy_warning: Low energy! Rest to recover energy.

work.title: Choose Work Type
work.subtitle: Select a job to accept as your active job
work.select_to_apply: Select a work type to apply

part_time.name: Part-time Job
part_time.desc: Low-stress work at a local shop. Always available, modest pay.

full_time.name: Full-time Work
full_time.desc: Standard job with steady income. The baseline option.

freelance.name: Freelance Gig
freelance.desc: Contract work with variable pay. Higher intellect earns more.

coaching.name: Running Coach
coaching.desc: Train other runners. Pay scales with your running skill.

sponsor_event.name: Sponsorship Event
sponsor_event.desc: Paid appearance for your sponsor. Best pay/energy ratio.

corporate.name: Corporate Work
corporate.desc: High-paying office job. Demanding but lucrative.

coach.name: Fitness Coach
coach.desc: Guide others on workouts. Small pay, high charisma boost.

brand_ambassador.name: Brand Ambassador
brand_ambassador.desc: Promote brands, earn commissions. Requires social flair.

marathon_trainer.name: Marathon Trainer
marathon_trainer.desc: Train runners for marathons. High stamina payoff.

content_creator.name: Content Creator
content_creator.desc: Create running content for social media. Build your brand while earning.

personal_trainer.name: Personal Trainer
personal_trainer.desc: Train clients one-on-one. Use your running expertise to help others.

sports_nutritionist.name: Sports Nutritionist
sports_nutritionist.desc: Advise athletes on nutrition and diet. Blend knowledge with running experience.

running_store_staff.name: Running Store Staff
running_store_staff.desc: Work at a specialty running store. Help customers find the right gear.

event_organizer.name: Event Organizer
event_organizer.desc: Organize running events and races. Leadership and experience required.

warehouse_worker.name: Warehouse Worker
warehouse_worker.desc: Physical labor loading and unloading packages. Low requirements, decent pay.

delivery_driver.name: Delivery Driver
delivery_driver.desc: Deliver packages around the city. Flexible hours, moderate pay.

social_media_manager.name: Social Media Manager
social_media_manager.desc: Manage social media for local businesses. Charisma and creativity focused.

physical_therapist.name: Physical Therapist
physical_therapist.desc: Help athletes recover from injuries. Running knowledge and intellect required.

race_official.name: Race Official
race_official.desc: Officiate at running events. Requires race experience and professionalism.

daily_trainer.name: Daily Trainer
daily_trainer.desc: Balanced and durable. Standard pace, normal fatigue.

carbon_racer.name: Carbon Racer
carbon_racer.desc: Extremely fast but increases muscle fatigue.

lightweight.name: Lightweight Trainer
lightweight.desc: Lightweight for faster pacing, moderate comfort.

trail.name: Trail Shoes
trail.desc: Excellent grip on trails, slower on road.

electrolyte.name: Electrolytes
electrolyte.desc: Reduces cramp risk and helps sustain hydration.

energy_gel.name: Energy Gel
energy_gel.desc: Provides a mid-race energy boost, but risks stomach stress.

caffeine.name: Caffeine
caffeine.desc: Boosts early focus and aggressive pace potential, but increases risk of a later energy crash.

cap.name: Cap
cap.desc: Protects from heat and light rain.

hydration_vest.name: Hydration Vest
hydration_vest.desc: Extra water capacity. Increases fatigue slightly.

none.name: None
none.desc: Saves energy but increases early injury risk.

full.name: Full Routine
full.desc: Peak readiness, consumes a bit of initial energy.

negative_split.name: Negative Split
negative_split.desc: Start slow, finish strong. Safe and efficient.

aggressive.name: Aggressive
aggressive.desc: Push hard from the start. High risk, high reward.

conservative.name: Conservative
conservative.desc: Save energy, stay comfortable. Safe completion.

calm.name: Calm
calm.desc: Keeps heart rate low. Resists panic.

briefing.title: Daily Briefing
briefing.subtitle: Analyze the conditions and plan your strategy

race.timeout_instinct: Timeout! Your runner acts on instinct...

race_choice.title: Today I'm Running...
race_choice.cta: What race are YOU picking today?

modal.title: Share Your Journey
modal.subtitle: Let others know about your choices and results!

analysis.title: Race Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Study the course and prepare your strategy

training.plan_your_week: Plan your weekly workouts to build fitness and manage fatigue.

feedback.overtraining_risk: {count} hard days scheduled - high injury risk. Consider replacing one with an easy run.
feedback.no_rest_days: No rest days scheduled - overtraining risk. Add at least one full rest day.
feedback.back_to_back_hard_days: Hard days are back-to-back. Allow 48+ hours between intense sessions.
feedback.high_fatigue: Your fatigue is high. Consider a recovery week instead.
feedback.good_spacing: Great plan! Your hard days are well-spaced for optimal recovery.
feedback.good_balance: Good balance of training and recovery.
feedback.add_second_session: Tip: Consider adding a second quality session for faster improvement.
feedback.more_volume: You could handle more volume - consider adding another easy run.
feedback.great_race_recovery: Great race! This week is for recovery - easy efforts only.
feedback.taper_week: Race coming up! This is your taper week. Focus on rest and light runs.
feedback.solid_plan: This is a solid, balanced training plan. Stay consistent!
feedback.decent_plan: Decent plan, but consider the suggestions above for optimization.
